meta.title: Orientation of Birds
meta.sourceDoc: 44. P2 - Orientation of Birds 鸟类的定位能力.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Orientation of Birds 鸟类的定位能力

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：visual memory
PDF 定位/解析：visual memory C段第2句：Suchbirdspossessahighlydevelopedvisualmemory.."第一类归巢靠精细的视觉记忆。

题目 15
答案：migration direction
PDF 定位/解析：migration direction D段第2句："Theyappearto choose their normalmigrationdirection even if theyare released.."第二类鸟无论在哪都 会保持惯常迁飞方向。

题目 16
答案：destination
PDF 定位/解析：destination D段末句："..butflywestoftheirdestination,andsofailtoarrive."持续原方向可能导致错过目的地。

题目 17
答案：landmarks
PDF 定位/解析：landmarks E段末句：..couldn'trelyonanylandmarksoverthevastexpanseofthePacificOcean."第三类鸟即使没有地标也能定 向。

题目 18
答案：Laysan albatross
PDF 定位/解析：E段开头实例：提到一只Laysanalbatross10天飞5,000km回到Midway，完美演示第三类行为。 Laysan albatross

questionSections.text:
题目 19
答案：C
PDF 定位：C段："Ifthebirdsaretransported80okm...onlybygoodfortune..."讨论放飞距离增大导致成功率骤降-
PDF 解析："距离对归巢能力的影响"。

题目 20
答案：B
PDF 定位/解析：B段整体：描述"捕捉-放飞-记录返回率"并改变距离/方向/运输方式的methodology。

题目 21
答案：C
PDF 定位/解析：C段："Birds'eyeshavea powerofresolution twotothree timesgreaterthanours..."对比人类与鸟在视觉分辨率上的生理能力。

题目 22
答案：G
PDF 定位/解析：G段："Schiz caughtfirst-year European storks andreleased themlater,afterthedepartureofthe adult storks.."通过推迟幼鸟迁徙时间 来做实验。

questionSections.text:
题目 23
答案：C
PDF 定位：domestic pigeon C *the ability to remember things seen previously"
PDF 解析：C 段:...trained to peck at a point on an aerial photograph .. fouryearslaterthebirdswerestill able..."-显示极强视觉记 忆。

题目 24
答案：F
PDF 定位：Alpine swift F "a high success rate in finding nests"
PDF 解析：F段:"Great migrants such as the swift have the highest percentage of returns. Seven out of nine alpine swifts were recaptured.."一先点名成功率，再举7/9例证；3天飞完只是 补充细节。

题目 25
答案：A
PDF 定位：European stork A "an ability to orientate without previous training"
PDF 解析：G段：幼在无成年带领的情况下仍"一致朝西南"一 一天生定 向，无需学习。

题目 26
答案：D
PDF 定位：starling D - "the effect of age on homing ability"
PDF 解析：H段：同批放飞后，"adults...whereasthe juveniles..."成鸟能 修正航向，幼鸟则偏离一突出年龄差异。
